about.title: ABOUT AdiKoding
about.subtitle: Discover Adi a.k.a Kuro Adi at adikoding.com — coding educator, creative developer, and Roblox game creator. Join the AdiKoding Discord Server for updates & coaching
about.content: Hi I am Adi a.k.a Kuro Adi. Welcome to adikoding.com website . So what these website is for? it's my branding as coding educator and creative developer. And dont forget to join my Discord server for more info about my coaching program and latest update of my creation. Especially Roblox game that's I made
